data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice currency lock after confirmation', but the evidence does not provide any information regarding the locking of the currency after the booking confirmation. The bookings are confirmed in USD, but there is no indication that the currency was locked at the time of confirmation, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the evidence does not demonstrate that the currency used for invoicing was fixed post-confirmation, which is essential for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of currency locking mechanism after booking confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
